title: Allium Raises $40 Million to Help Enterprises Embrace the Blockchain
snippet: Enterprise-focused blockchain data platform Allium has raised $40 million in new funding. title: Mosta launches stablecoin for instant cross-border settlement
snippet: Mosta, the AI-native business banking platform for global companies and AI agents, today announced the launch of MainUSD, its own U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by Brale, a U.S.-regulated stablecoin issuance provider.

title: Blockchain platform Allium raises $40 million Series B
snippet: Allium, the leading blockchain data platform for enterprises, today announced it has raised $40 million in Series B funding led by Amplify Partners, with participation from existing investors Kleiner Perkins and Theory Ventures. Amplify’s David Beyer will join the Board as part of the investment.

title: OKX Europe chief says 80% of crypto exchanges won’t survive MiCA as deadline nears
snippet: OKX Europe CEO Ghoos said 80% of exchanges won't survive MiCA as ESMA forces unlicensed firms to cease EU operations by July 1.

title: Tether-backed Oobit brings USDT to nearly 170 million users of Brazil’s PIX payment network
snippet: Created by Banco Central do Brasil in 2020, PIX is one of the world's most widely-adopted digital payment networks.

title: Opera's MiniPay launches Visa debit card for stablecoin spending
snippet: The card will allow MiniPay's 16 million users to spend stablecoins through Visa's network as adoption of digital dollars grows across emerging markets.

title: Midas’ mGLOBAL token tracking Fasanara’s alternative debt strategy launches on Aave Horizon
snippet: Holders will now be able to deposit mGLOBAL tokens on Aave Horizon to borrow USDC while retaining full exposure to the underlying strategy.

title: Ripple gains preliminary MiCA license ahead of July 1 EU deadline
snippet: Ripple secures preliminary CASP approval in Luxembourg ahead of July 1 MiCA deadline as companies race for EU crypto licensing.

title: Chainlink Helping Banks Launch Cross-Border Stablecoin Trades
snippet: Chainlink is reportedly joining several dozen international banks on a cross-border stablecoin payments project. Former BIS chief softens stance on stablecoins, backs coexistence with fiat
snippet: Former BIS general manager Agustín Carstens said stablecoins can enhance financial inclusion and innovation but stressed the need for global regulatory frameworks to enable coexistence with fiat money.

title: BIS identifies stablecoin gaps. Regulation and innovations are already closing them
snippet: A year after the Bank for International Settlements branded stablecoins “unsound money,” the BIS has returned with a more constructive follow up. title: BNY sees 'FOMO' driving asset managers into tokenized funds
Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
snippet: Banks across Europe and South Korea will study whether regulated euro and won stablecoins can enable real-time cross-border foreign exchange settlement.

title: Why tokenized SpaceX shares broke before retail investors could buy them
snippet: Tokenized SpaceX shares drew more than $1 billion in demand, but many investors received refunds instead. What went wrong?

title: Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back Ethereum R&D nonprofit
snippet: Sharplink says the new nonprofit, Ethlabs, “exists to ensure the network is ready to absorb” the demand that institutions will place on it with stablecoins, tokenization and AI.
